title: Learn Unreal Engine
description: The official learning portal for Unreal Engine, featuring hundreds of hours of free tutorials and learning paths.

title: Unity Learn
description: Structured pathways to master game development with the Unity engine, from beginner to advanced.

title: GameDev.tv Courses
description: Highly rated courses for C++, C#, Unity, Unreal, and Blender. Great for practical project-based learning.

title: Quixel Megascans
description: A massive library of high-quality 3D scans, textures, and assets. Free for use with Unreal Engine.

title: ArtStation
description: The leading showcase platform for games, media & entertainment artists. Essential for portfolios.

title: GitHub for Gamedev
description: Version control is essential. Learn how to manage large binary files with Git LFS.

title: Game Industry Resume Guide
description: How to structure your resume specifically for game studios. Tips from recruiters and leads.

title: Interview Prep Kit
description: Common technical and behavioral questions asked during Canadian game studio interviews.

title: Portfolio Review Checklist
description: Ensure your portfolio hits the marks that hiring managers in Canada are looking for.

title: Canadian Gamedev Discord
description: Join our community of developers in Canada. Network, share work, and find opportunities.
